creator: hm@hm.net.br
text:
Can not mount sony cybershot (any) as usb mass storage/mem stick

ugen1.3: <Sony> at usbus1
umass1: <Sony Sony DSC, class 0/0, rev 2.00/6.00, addr 3> on usbus1
umass1:  RBC over CBI; quirks = 0x1000
umass1:5:1:-1: Attached to scbus5
